description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details A small red wallet with a handle to swing it from your wrist One main compartment with an internal elastic pouch One mobile holder in front with a flap with a leathery finish and a Velcro closure One zipped compartment in the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Dimensions 10 cm x 14 cm
